text.title: ai-enhanced-design-systems Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-enhanced-design-systems as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Connecting AI tooling to a design system with no agreed single source of truth for tokens
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI will silently pick one source and ignore the other. The result is a system where Figma and code drift further apart, faster.

failure-mode.description: Auto-merging AI-generated Storybook stories without reviewing edge cases and error states
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI-generated stories default to the happy path. Error states, disabled states, and loading states are systematically missing unless explicitly prompted.

failure-mode.description: Agent misrepresents union types and complex generics when parsing TypeScript prop interfaces
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ts-morph or AST parsing handles complex types accurately; LLM-only prop extraction from code text makes errors on union, intersection, and conditional types.

failure-mode.description: Agent reads Figma API component properties and treats them as current without checking the timestamp
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Figma API returns data as it exists in Figma, which may lag code by weeks. Always timestamp both sources and surface the lag in the diff report.

failure-mode.description: Agent triggers synchronous Chromatic visual regression runs and blocks on them
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Visual regression on a component library can take 10+ minutes. Agent-triggered Chromatic runs must be async with webhook callback, not inline in a synchronous pipeline step.

failure-mode.description: Agent generating token suggestions based on Material Design or Ant Design defaults
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Token suggestion models are trained on generic design systems. Suggestions may not fit brand personality or existing token naming conventions. Always review against actual brand guidelines.
